use_cases:
When you need Penetration Testing, use Lune because LUNE
[![CI](https://github.com/GnomeMan4201/Lune/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/GnomeMan4201/Lune/actions/workflows/ci.yml).
When you need a concrete invocation, run `python3 -m venv .venv` as documented upstream for Lune.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `source .venv/bin/activate` as documented upstream for Lune.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cd lune/lune` as documented upstream for Lune.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `python3 lune-tui.py` as documented upstream for Lune.
When chaining Penetration Testing tools, pair Lune with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `Lune --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
